description: Pydantic Settings with environment configuration management
acceptance_criteria: All environment variables defined, validation for required fields, environment profiles support

description: Async SQLAlchemy engine, session management, and database dependencies
acceptance_criteria: Async engine configured, session factory, get_db dependency for FastAPI

description: JWT token creation, password hashing, authentication utilities
acceptance_criteria: JWT create/verify functions, BCrypt password utilities, security dependencies

description: Abstract base model with audit fields and common functionality
acceptance_criteria: BaseModel with id, created_at, updated_at, automatic timestamp updates

description: User entity with authentication and role management
acceptance_criteria: User model with email, password_hash, role enum, relationships to audit logs

description: Policy entity with relationships to vehicles, locations, coverages
acceptance_criteria: Policy model with all required fields, encrypted SSN/TIN, relationships to dependent entities

description: Claim entity with policy relationships and status management
acceptance_criteria: Claim model with policy FK, status enum, relationships to payments and overrides

description: Payment entity with payee relationships and complex allocation structures
acceptance_criteria: Payment models including Payee, PaymentMethod, PaymentPayee with proper relationships

description: Audit logging entity for tracking all data changes
acceptance_criteria: AuditLog model with entity tracking, field-level changes, correlation IDs

description: Authentication request/response schemas
acceptance_criteria: LoginRequest, LoginResponse, RegisterRequest schemas with validation

description: User management request/response schemas
acceptance_criteria: UserCreate, UserUpdate, UserResponse schemas with role validation

description: Policy management request/response schemas with search criteria
acceptance_criteria: PolicyCreate, PolicyUpdate, PolicyResponse, PolicySearchRequest with all search fields

description: Claim management request/response schemas
acceptance_criteria: ClaimCreate, ClaimUpdate, ClaimResponse, ClaimStatusUpdate schemas

description: Payment processing request/response schemas
acceptance_criteria: PaymentCreate, PaymentUpdate, PaymentResponse, PayeeCreate schemas with validation

description: Common response schemas and pagination models
acceptance_criteria: ErrorResponse, PageResponse, HealthResponse schemas

description: FastAPI dependencies for authentication, database, and authorization
acceptance_criteria: get_current_user, require_role, get_db dependencies with proper error handling

description: Authentication endpoints for login and registration
acceptance_criteria: POST /auth/login, POST /auth/register, POST /auth/refresh endpoints with proper validation

description: User management endpoints
acceptance_criteria: GET /users/me, PUT /users/me, GET /users/{id}, POST /users, DELETE /users/{id}

description: Policy management endpoints with search functionality
acceptance_criteria: GET /policies/search, GET /policies/{id}, POST /policies, PUT /policies/{id}, DELETE /policies/{id}

description: Claim management endpoints
acceptance_criteria: GET /claims/{id}, POST /claims, PUT /claims/{id}, PUT /claims/{id}/status, GET /policies/{id}/claims

description: Payment processing endpoints
acceptance_criteria: GET /payments/{id}, POST /payments, PUT /payments/{id}/void, POST /payments/{id}/reverse, GET /claims/{id}/payments

description: Health check endpoints for monitoring
acceptance_criteria: GET /health/live, GET /health/ready with database connectivity checks

description: Authentication business logic and user management
acceptance_criteria: login, register, refresh_token functions with proper validation and error handling

description: Policy management business logic with search optimization
acceptance_criteria: create_policy, update_policy, search_policies, get_policy_details with performance optimization

description: Claim processing business logic and status management
acceptance_criteria: create_claim, update_claim, update_status, get_claim_history with business rule validation

description: Payment processing business logic with external integrations
acceptance_criteria: create_payment, void_payment, reverse_payment, process_external_payment with transaction safety

description: Audit logging service for tracking data changes
acceptance_criteria: log_change function with entity tracking, correlation IDs, field-level change detection

description: Data encryption, masking, and security utilities
acceptance_criteria: encrypt_sensitive_data, decrypt_data, mask_ssn_tin functions with Fernet encryption

description: Audit logging utilities and decorators
acceptance_criteria: audit_operation decorator, extract_changes function for model comparison

description: Correlation ID middleware for request tracing
acceptance_criteria: Correlation ID generation, contextvars management, header propagation

description: External system integration utilities with circuit breaker pattern
acceptance_criteria: BaseIntegration class with retry logic, timeout handling, circuit breaker implementation

description: FastAPI application entry point with middleware and route configuration
acceptance_criteria: FastAPI app with CORS, middleware, API router inclusion, startup/shutdown events

description: API router configuration and versioning
acceptance_criteria: API router with v1 prefix, route inclusion, proper OpenAPI configuration

description: API v1 router with all endpoint collections
acceptance_criteria: V1 router including auth, users, policies, claims, payments, health endpoints

description: Global exception handling and custom exceptions
acceptance_criteria: Custom exceptions, global exception handlers, consistent error response format

description: Alembic environment configuration for async database migrations
acceptance_criteria: Alembic async configuration, model import, proper database URL handling

description: Python dependencies with specific versions for production stability
acceptance_criteria: All required packages with pinned versions, development and production dependencies
